text: I hope those who came up with this can't buy food in a store, receiving a 'document review request' that takes forever to process.

I ordered birthday gifts for a special needs little girl and paid extra to have them delivered quickly! You guessed it…the items were never delivered!!! And, customer service claims there is nothing they can do until the items are delivered!
Don't buy ANY books from Amazon. They are going to send you already damaged books.

Amazon told me my parcel would be delivered, driver turned up no parcel, I phoned Amazon and was told parcel on its way, few hours later I was told parcel would be delivered by 10pm at midnight I received email that parcel could not be delivered as damaged.
I spent 2 hours on the phone with Amazon customer service, they transferred me to 5 different agents and finally never resolved the issue.
Delivery driver called me to say he was on my street so I waited outside for 15 minutes, only to get a notification that said I wasn't in and the delivery had failed.
I ordered an Apple Magic keyboard, received a wooden picture frame.

Our driver either can not read, doesn't understand English or just can't be arsed! Even leaving a polite note on the front door stating to NOT LEAVE PARCELS ON THE DOORSTEP had no effect and came home to parcels left on doorstep once again!
Despite emails back and forth to couriers who are now quoting me £119 to send it back! (Product cost £170)
They seem to think that everyone is unemployed and sitting home all day. "Between 8am and 10pm" is not exactly helpful.
It took me 2 hours to get this answer because of all the robotic CS replies on the way.
NEVER GET THE AMAZON VISA CARD/CHASE - YOU CAN DO MUCH BETTER REWARDS WISE & NOT HAVE TO JUMP THRU FLAMING HOOPS TO PAY UR DANG BILL!!!!!!!!!!!!!
When I spoke to customer service they said I cannot have a refund or a replacement as its been longer than 30 days?? But I was out of the country and it's their fault they did not deliver!

I contacted with UPS office, and they said that the weight of the product to deliver to my home is the exactly the same weight as the pick up from my home for both of the mobiles so how the box will be empty?

They increase Prime membership yet the majority of product takes several days for delivery AND if you find the same product with 2nd day delivery, it's marked up significantly higher than the same product with several day delivery.

Ordered something, told arrival will be in 2 days. 2 days later, there has been a delay, it will arrive the next day. Waited in all day the next day, no show and no updates. They just left me standing.
Amazon customer service then said that even though their system did not acknowledge any fault by Amazon they would give me a refund. Amazon customer service then hung up and did not give me a refund.
This company is constantly delivering my items to other houses...I've had the same address for several years. They also are sending me things I didn't order or changing prices on your item.
Shoppers beware, most of the time, Amazon is not the cheapest. Just go to the store and get the item now.

I've contacted them 3 separate times to schedule pick up of items I never even ordered because I did not want to throw them away. Was disconnected several times and the pick ups all 3 times were scheduled to the wrong address.
They closed my account for days due to their error! I had to go buy Apple TV's. Then the email stating it was a mistake. I asked that they refund me for my Apple TV's and I have heard nothing.
Whoever decided the review comments feature should be removed must be on drugs and deserves to be thrown off a building. It causes me fatigue and sulk each time I think about it.
So at the moment, having to order a second unit due to low stock, I am now over £640 out of pocket and have no unit. Why they could not just send a filter pack is beyond reason.
He did tell me that it could be at the post office, or possibly even on the side of the road, he just didn't know! What a joke!
I confronted one of the delivery persons about leaving packages in the lobby and they told me this is not their problem.
My daughter called about a query and they cancelled the member without asking and now I have to pay monthly. Amazon's loss others gain.
Don't offer me 10% off of a fire stick remote when YOU deemed it defective! Purchased six month ago and it's defective....that's on you.
They only gave me a refund for one pair and not the other. They said they didnt receive the 2nd pair and finally after 4 weeks found it but said it was damaged and charged me for it.
I ordered two expensive programming books so I could get free shipping, only now they don't bother to ship if choose that option. My programming project is delayed.
Tried to file for a return immediately and received intimation that i would have to take it into a Pitboss service center (nearly 140 miles) away.
Tonight wanted to watch mirical on 34th street, a Christmas classic, and was so disappointed to find that all the popular version even though the black and white option was pay per view.
Why the hell do I pay for Prime AND get a prime day deal if the item is now being sold way cheaper??? The markup price of the item during Prime day was $349.99 and now it's marked as $175.

On more than one occasion when I have returned items only one shows up on the return label so I have not been refunded for the other items. I have begun to wonder if Amazon is doing this deliberately to keep the excess.
My last order was left outside for anyone to come along and take it. They didn't even ring my doorbell.
I'm cancelling subscription because I seldom get shipping times stated on their products. Very frustrating.

I asked them why my package was delayed when it arrived in my city center the day before. now it left my facility and went to 5 cities away. she replayed with they didn't have it in that one, which is dumb because it got shipped from texas to my facility.

They often run over my lawn putting ruts in it. They sometimes run over my driveway markers (which are there to prevent vehicles from running into the culvert). My driveway is asphalt and I am seeing damage caused by heavy trucks.
Customer Service is mainly outsourced with completely clueless and incompetent help. They're about as useful as the animatronics found in Disney parks.
They would be nice at first but by the end, they would just randomly disconnect.

Amazon won't let me post a review with the issues I had and rejected my review stating the condition I received the boots in. So I am done ordering anything from them. They're getting to big for their own good!
50% of sellers are scammers who buy fake reviews. some products contain more then hundreds of 5 star reviews in a single day.
I recommend anyone who has Amazon account to check if they are charged mysteriously from them. At the end, I gave up, I have to cancel my credit card and concluded it as a fraud to get my money back.
a solar panel of 10 by 20 cm can never be 50wp as an example. Solarchargers of type mppt that are not that type at all, bad performances. Not every buyer is an expert.
If I search for "Asus" why is the first page filled with your "sponsored" stuff that is not what I searched for? And most of it is Temu garbage.
To say that it's annoying is an understatement. Clearly they really need to improve on this.
My mop arrived 6 days later than planned. Once it came I was very happy with it though so worth the wait.

So I decided to annoy again and again and again and again until I had another idea. Let's just directly mail Andy Jassy the ceo of Amazon which I did next. I did mention that in the customer support chat and 10 seconds later I got reconnected to someone from problem prevention.

I cannot tell whether my items were stolen or they were not delivered at all equals a scam. I bought items such as ram, facewash, sweatshirt, earplug, gaming controller that were not delivered at all.
If you sign up for thank you and rewards points thru citi.com that helps.
Try to place an order and they tell me they will get back with me in 24 hours. Been a week. Is this the best this rich greedy jerk can do?
Firstly, I was promised 2 day delivery. 2 days later, I checked the status only to realize that it will be delayed till the end of the week. And this isn't the first time too.
Prime Day deals are a rip off really, some items only a marginal discount and only ever seem to really push their own products!!

I really am un-happy about the new tracking/targeting system. I feel that they are now charging me more for idem's that I may want. Amazon has lost 40% of my business because of this. But they have lots of money... :)

Trainers for my adult son arrived with NO packaging at all, just in their shoe box which was not even taped down. The lid was actually open. so glad I was back home as it was pouring with rain and would have had sodden box and shoes.
I've placed literally hundreds of orders through Amazon, and 98% of the time, I've been satisfied either with the product I received, or a full refund.

I had a strange package delivered instead of the 3 items I ordered. The website is a little like chasing your own tail before you give up and find a way to contact a customer service representative, however once you get to a live person and explain the problem they take care of it.

They would not accept my nice, but truthful review. Therefore do NOT trust their REVIEWS. At an Auto Shop, Feu Vert, in Gandia, Valencia, I bought beautifully engineered, Italian made roofracks for only 15€ more!!!

I bought a Fire TV from them for Black Friday and it has been pretty darn good! I do really, REALLY, recommend having a Prime account. It has so many valuable assets to it; music, TV and movies, free shipping, etc.
Amazon used to be 100% one day delivery, but anymore it's totally hit and miss. Even when you order something 'in stock' it comes late because it was out of stock. Amazon is slipping.
Best customer service I've seen, ever! Just don't buy things not shipped BY amazon
Watch out for third party sellers selling via Amazon - I always buy direct from Amazon where possible.
Same item I find the price much higher than ebay or other webstores. Amazon make a lot of money, customers pay for them.
Seems like the boys in shipping dozed off and put in two of the wrong books. So I forgiiiiiive you Amazonians. Laugh if you got the cashgh, otherwise laugh anyways cause yo mama's a punk.
Amazon have got the buying experience down to a tee. Good product descriptions, excellent reviews (even the bad ones).
I love amazon! I use it for half my shopping. The online store also has almost anything you can think of ranging from toiletries, clothes, to electronics and furniture!
I am not keen on having to pay for the ad free Prime Video. That's been recently introduced and it's very costly when added onto the monthly subscription.
From Montréal everything i bought so far good quality and fast service and a lab top at 75% off great buy! The only thing was (dog food Salmon) Which my dog didnot want to eat! Complex for return.
I just received a wrong item and they refunded it immediately. Thank you for the great customer support.
i buy all my chocolate and yankee candles from there.
It's the best website I have ever used. Truly a masterpiece.

I have issues with Bezos' oligarch status in modern American society but this company is a Rockstar... Amazon fixed it in the first three minutes of my raising it to their attention. I mean seriously - that's greater customer service.
GOOGLE should take a lesson from AMAZON.
My shipment came in damaged. I didn't expect anything but complained to Amazon about the packaging. They sent me a replacement and refunded my money the next day.
The sheer scale of the offerings and ability to be price competitive on seemingly almost all of those items is shockingly good.

Am a (student) prime member and love the next day delivery + option to opt out and get voucher. Also use prime video, Lenders library, kindle first, subscribe and save, and prime music, which are all excellent.

I had an abusive return experience from HVAC / IAQ SUPPLY they charge me almost 50% of the cost of the item just because I decided to return the item in the same condition I received it, plus you need to expend your own money to ship it back to them. If you buy from them make sure you really going to keep it if not you
The live chat feature helped me know what I could order and the delivered products exceeded my expecatations.
Customer service is excellent and they go above and beyond if any problem arises. Always my first stop!
Too bad that they don't send "everything" to my country, have tried ordering toys a couple of times with no luck.
I have been able to find many product that I have searched for on line but again I should have looked at Amazon first, it would have saved me a lot of trouble.
Never had a bad time with these guys. Good selection, accurate delivery times, good condition and timely arrivals. Can't be faulted.
Amazon is usually the first port of call when I want to find something at bargain prices!
